results.rendered_html:
ajanman a. Unborn, epithet of the Unborn Being, the Eternal being; puruṣasya padeṣvajanmanaḥ  R. 8. 78. 
— m. [ nāsti janma yatra] Final beatitude, absolution; tasmātsa yogādadhigamya yogamajanmane'kalpata janmabhīruḥ  R. 18. 33.
